parameters.command:
=set -e
f="{{ $env.EMPIRE_REPO_PATH }}/ops/cache/sync-log.json"
if [ ! -f "$f" ]; then echo '{"present":false}'; exit 0; fi
mtime=$(date -u -r "$f" +%s 2>/dev/null || stat -c %Y "$f")
now=$(date -u +%s)
age_hours=$(awk -v n="$now" -v m="$mtime" 'BEGIN{printf "%.2f", (n-m)/3600}')
printf '{"present":true,"ageHours":%s}\n' "$age_hours"
